Title: Glitch Live QR Hoodie
Body (HTML):
Heavyweight Pullover Hood – Premium Quality Meets Everyday Comfort

Elevate your hoodie game with our Heavyweight Pullover Hood, meticulously designed for style, durability, and top-tier print results. Weighing in at approximately 10 oz (330g) and crafted from a cotton/polyester blend 3-End fleece, this hoodie offers superior warmth and structure, ideal for both streetwear and lifestyle apparel.

The 100% cotton 32 singles face yarn (available in Solid Colors, Athletic Heather, and Gunmetal Heather) provides an ultra-smooth surface, perfect for screen printing and customization. Note: the Charcoal Heather variant does not have a 100% cotton face.

Thoughtful Details Include:

  • Pre-shrunk fabric to maintain a consistent fit

  • Split-stitch double needle seams for reinforced durability

  • 1x1 ribbing at the neck, cuffs, and waistband for a snug feel

  • Back neck tape and tear-away label for added comfort and easy rebranding

  • Side-seamed construction for structure and flexibility

  • Standard fit for a universally flattering silhouette

Print Tip: For best results on blends, use a quality poly blocker to avoid dye migration.

Whether you’re printing, branding, or just layering up, this hoodie is more than just a staple — it’s a statement of quality and craftsmanship.
